scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n maestro,ui,script,voice,visual,json2video,magichour -c blue,white,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red "npm run dev" "npm --prefix maestro-ui run dev" "npm --prefix agents/script-agent run dev" "npm --prefix agents/voice-agent run dev" "npm --prefix agents/visual-agent run dev" "npm --prefix agents/json2video-agent run dev" "npm --prefix agents/magichour-video-agent run dev"
scripts.dev:agents: concurrently -k -n script,voice,visual -c green,magenta,cyan "npm --prefix agents/script-agent run dev" "npm --prefix agents/voice-agent run dev" "npm --prefix agents/visual-agent run dev"
